crime.value: Homicide of a young Black girl found at a city dump, with evidence including fingerprints, hair sample, and tire imprints
crime.quote: the dead body of a young Black girl

victim.value: Ethel Lamb, a mentally handicapped young Black girl from poor circumstances who was vulnerable due to her condition
victim.quote: Mentally handicapped children more so. Handicapped children are vulnerable to adults.

closed_world.value: Nautilus Beach, New Jersey - a community separated from the mainland by salt meadows
closed_world.quote: salt Meadows that separated Nautilus Beach, New Jersey from the mainland

culprit_and_motive.value: Ellsworth Perkins - motive not clearly stated in excerpt but appears to involve exploitation of vulnerable victim
culprit_and_motive.quote: the arrest of Ellsworth Perkins would have been sooner rather than later

resolution.value: Police investigation using forensic evidence (fingerprints, hair samples, tire imprints) leading to arrest of Perkins
resolution.quote: Latent prints, a hair sample, tire imprint at the crime scene

investigator.value: Captain Robert Wallace, Commanding Officer of the Major Crime Squad, with Sergeant Woodson assisting
investigator.quote: Captain Robert Wallace, Commanding Officer of the police departments Major Crime Squad

suspect_architecture.value: Single identified suspect: Ellsworth Perkins, with implied delayed arrest suggesting investigative focus narrowed to him as primary perpetrator
suspect_architecture.quote: the arrest of Ellsworth Perkins would have been sooner rather than later

red_herring.value: Initial lead suggesting suspect name 'El' or beginning with 'L' - misdirection that eventually led to correct suspect Ellsworth
red_herring.quote: a small lead on a potential suspect with the name El or with a name beginning with L

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence presented to reader: latent prints, hair sample, tire imprint at crime scene matching suspect's vehicle
clue_fairness.quote: Latent prints, a hair sample, tire imprint at the crime scene

social_world.value: Police hierarchy under community pressure; racial dynamics with Black community demanding justice; systemic failures across welfare, education, and juvenile justice
social_world.quote: delegation of people from the Black community wanting to know how much progress we're making

reveal_mechanic.value: VIN number investigation linking suspect's vehicle to tire cast evidence from crime scene
reveal_mechanic.quote: She might have found the suspects car and the tire that matches the cast

media_and_audience.value: Community pressure on police leadership; institutional accountability across multiple systems blamed for victim's vulnerability
media_and_audience.quote: Think of all the times when you as an individual was asked to donate time as a volunteer

investigator_wound.value: Captain Wallace's admission of professional failure - being 'lax in reviewing work' and missing mistakes that delayed justice
investigator_wound.quote: As the commanding officer...I was lax in reviewing the work of the members of the squad

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton a predetermined course of events
